summary: The diff implements a KurtaSuitProductSection component and integrates it into ProductBrowse. However, the image source used in the component points to the wrong path ('/assets/IMG_20260226_075731.jpg') instead of the required '/assets/generated/kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg'. All other acceptance criteria appear to be met.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg
missing_requirements.reason: The KurtaSuitProductSection component uses '/assets/IMG_20260226_075731.jpg' as the image src instead of the required '/assets/generated/kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg'. The specified image path is not used anywhere in the diff.
